    as 2.7.6, Dubbo Lifecycle components will be registered automatically. Current class may be removed in the future

    com.alibaba.dubbo.rpc.protocol.dubbo.FutureAdapter
    org.apache.dubbo.common.json.GenericJSONConverter
    org.apache.dubbo.rpc.protocol.thrift.io.InputStreamWrapper
    org.apache.dubbo.common.json.JSON
    org.apache.dubbo.common.json.JSONArray
    org.apache.dubbo.common.json.JSONObject
    org.apache.dubbo.common.json.JSONReader
    org.apache.dubbo.common.json.JSONToken
    org.apache.dubbo.common.json.JSONWriter

    com.alibaba.dubbo.config.ModuleConfig
    com.alibaba.dubbo.config.MonitorConfig

    org.apache.dubbo.config.spring.context.config.NamePropertyDefaultValueDubboConfigBeanCustomizer
    DubboConfigDefaultPropertyValueBeanPostProcessor instead

    org.apache.dubbo.common.config.configcenter.nop.NopDynamicConfigurationFactory

    Replace to org.apache.dubbo.common.Constants
    com.alibaba.dubbo.rpc.RpcContext
    org.apache.dubbo.config.spring.beans.factory.annotation.ServiceAnnotationBeanPostProcessor
    Recommend ServiceClassPostProcessor as the substitute
    com.alibaba.dubbo.config.ServiceConfig
    com.alibaba.dubbo.common.status.Status

    org.apache.dubbo.rpc.protocol.thrift.ThriftCodec

    异常错误和说明
    com.alibaba.dubbo.rpc.service.GenericException

  • 已过时的注释类型 
    注释类型和说明
    com.alibaba.dubbo.common.extension.Activate
    org.apache.dubbo.common.extension.DisableInject
    com.alibaba.dubbo.config.spring.context.annotation.EnableDubbo
    org.apache.dubbo.config.spring.context.annotation.EnableDubboLifecycle
    as 2.7.6, Dubbo Lifecycle components will be registered automatically. Current annotation may be removed in the future
    org.apache.dubbo.common.Extension
    because it's too general, switch to use SPI
    org.apache.dubbo.config.annotation.Reference
    Recommend DubboReference as the substitute
    com.alibaba.dubbo.config.annotation.Reference
    org.apache.dubbo.config.annotation.Service
    Recommend DubboService as the substitute
    com.alibaba.dubbo.config.annotation.Service
  • 已过时的字段 
    字段和说明
    org.apache.dubbo.common.constants.CommonConstants.SHUTDOWN_WAIT_SECONDS_KEY
  • 已过时的方法 
    方法和说明
    org.apache.dubbo.rpc.RpcInvocation.addAttachments(Map<String, String>)
    org.apache.dubbo.rpc.AsyncRpcResult.addAttachments(Map<String, String>)
    org.apache.dubbo.rpc.RpcInvocation.addAttachmentsIfAbsent(Map<String, String>)
    org.apache.dubbo.metadata.report.support.AbstractMetadataReportFactory.clear()
    org.apache.dubbo.metadata.report.MetadataReportInstance.destroy()
    org.apache.dubbo.common.extension.ExtensionLoader.destroyAll()
    org.apache.dubbo.config.bootstrap.builders.ProtocolBuilder.dispather(String)
    org.apache.dubbo.common.utils.ReflectUtils.findMethodByMethodName(Class<?>, String)
    Recommend MethodUtils.findMethod(Class, String, Class[])
    org.apache.dubbo.common.utils.ReflectUtils.findMethodByMethodSignature(Class<?>, String, String[])
    Recommend MethodUtils.findMethod(Class, String, Class[])
    org.apache.dubbo.rpc.model.ApplicationModel.getApplication()
    org.apache.dubbo.rpc.RpcInvocation.getAttachment(String, String)
    org.apache.dubbo.rpc.RpcInvocation.getAttachments()
    org.apache.dubbo.rpc.RpcContext.getAttachments()
    org.apache.dubbo.rpc.AsyncRpcResult.getAttachments()
    org.apache.dubbo.rpc.AppResponse.getAttachments()
    org.apache.dubbo.common.serialize.protobuf.support.wrapper.MapValue.MapOrBuilder.getAttachments()
    org.apache.dubbo.common.serialize.protobuf.support.wrapper.MapValue.Map.getAttachments()
    org.apache.dubbo.common.serialize.protobuf.support.wrapper.MapValue.Map.Builder.getAttachments()
    org.apache.dubbo.common.URL.getBooleanParameter(String)
    Replace to getParameter(String, boolean)
    org.apache.dubbo.common.URL.getBooleanParameter(String, boolean)
    Replace to getParameter(String, boolean)
    org.apache.dubbo.rpc.FutureContext.getCompatibleCompletableFuture()
    org.apache.dubbo.config.AbstractInterfaceConfig.getConfigCenter()
    org.apache.dubbo.config.ProviderConfig.getDispather()
    ProviderConfig.getDispatcher()
    org.apache.dubbo.config.ProtocolConfig.getDispather()
    ProtocolConfig.getDispatcher()
    org.apache.dubbo.remoting.transport.dispatcher.WrappedChannelHandler.getExecutorService()
    org.apache.dubbo.remoting.transport.AbstractPeer.getHandler()
    org.apache.dubbo.common.URL.getIntParameter(String)
    Replace to getParameter(String, int)
    org.apache.dubbo.common.URL.getIntParameter(String, int)
    Replace to getParameter(String, int)
    org.apache.dubbo.rpc.RpcContext.getInvocation()
    Replace to getMethodName(), getParameterTypes(), getArguments()
    org.apache.dubbo.rpc.RpcContext.getInvoker()
    Replace to getUrl()
    org.apache.dubbo.rpc.RpcContext.getInvokers()
    Replace to getUrls()
    org.apache.dubbo.config.AbstractInterfaceConfig.getLocal()
    Replace to getStub()
    org.apache.dubbo.config.AbstractInterfaceConfig.getMetadataReportConfig()
    org.apache.dubbo.common.URL.getMethodBooleanParameter(String, String)
    Replace to getMethodParameter(String, String, boolean)
    org.apache.dubbo.common.URL.getMethodBooleanParameter(String, String, boolean)
    Replace to getMethodParameter(String, String, boolean)
    org.apache.dubbo.common.URL.getMethodIntParameter(String, String)
    Replace to getMethodParameter(String, String, int)
    org.apache.dubbo.common.URL.getMethodIntParameter(String, String, int)
    Replace to getMethodParameter(String, String, int)
    org.apache.dubbo.common.URL.getMethodPositiveIntParameter(String, String, int)
    Replace to getMethodPositiveParameter(String, String, int)
    org.apache.dubbo.config.AbstractInterfaceConfig.getMetrics()
    org.apache.dubbo.common.serialize.protobuf.support.wrapper.MapValue.Map.Builder.getMutableAttachments()
    org.apache.dubbo.rpc.RpcInvocation.getObjectAttachment(String, Object)
    org.apache.dubbo.config.ProviderConfig.getPath()
    org.apache.dubbo.config.ProtocolConfig.getPath()
    org.apache.dubbo.common.URL.getPositiveIntParameter(String, int)
    Replace to getPositiveParameter(String, int)
    org.apache.dubbo.config.ServiceConfigBase.getProviders()
    Replace to getProtocols()
    org.apache.dubbo.common.URL.getServiceName()
    org.apache.dubbo.config.ReferenceConfig.getServices()
    org.apache.dubbo.config.ReferenceConfig.getSubscribedServices()
    org.apache.dubbo.config.RegistryConfig.getTransport() 
    org.apache.dubbo.config.RegistryConfig.getWait() 
    org.apache.dubbo.config.bootstrap.DubboBootstrap.init()
    org.apache.dubbo.config.bootstrap.builders.AbstractReferenceBuilder.injvm(Boolean)
    instead, use the parameter scope to judge if it's in jvm, scope=local
    org.apache.dubbo.rpc.RpcContext.isClientSide()
    Replace to isConsumerSide()
    com.alibaba.dubbo.rpc.RpcContext.isClientSide()
    org.apache.dubbo.config.AbstractReferenceConfig.isGeneric()
    org.apache.dubbo.config.AbstractReferenceConfig.isInjvm()
    instead, use the parameter scope to judge if it's in jvm, scope=local
    org.apache.dubbo.common.utils.ClassUtils.isPrimitive(Class<?>)
    as 2.7.6, use Class.isPrimitive() plus ClassUtils.isSimpleType(Class) instead
    org.apache.dubbo.config.MethodConfig.isReliable()
    org.apache.dubbo.config.MethodConfig.isRetry()
    org.apache.dubbo.rpc.RpcContext.isServerSide()
    Replace to isProviderSide()
    com.alibaba.dubbo.rpc.RpcContext.isServerSide()
    org.apache.dubbo.config.bootstrap.builders.AbstractInterfaceBuilder.local(Boolean)
    Replace to stub(Boolean)
    org.apache.dubbo.config.bootstrap.builders.AbstractInterfaceBuilder.local(String)
    Replace to stub(String)
    org.apache.dubbo.config.bootstrap.builders.ProtocolBuilder.path(String)
    org.apache.dubbo.common.serialize.ObjectInput.readObject()
    org.apache.dubbo.common.extension.ExtensionLoader.replaceExtension(String, Class<?>)
    not recommended any longer, and use only when test
    org.apache.dubbo.remoting.exchange.ExchangeChannel.request(Object)
    org.apache.dubbo.remoting.exchange.ExchangeChannel.request(Object, int)
    org.apache.dubbo.config.bootstrap.DubboBootstrap.reset()
    For testing purposes only
    org.apache.dubbo.rpc.model.ApplicationModel.reset()
    org.apache.dubbo.registry.support.AbstractRegistryFactory.reset()
    org.apache.dubbo.config.bootstrap.DubboBootstrap.reset(boolean)
    For testing purposes only
    org.apache.dubbo.remoting.RemotingServer.reset(Parameters)
    org.apache.dubbo.remoting.Client.reset(Parameters)
    org.apache.dubbo.remoting.exchange.support.ExchangeServerDelegate.reset(Parameters)
    org.apache.dubbo.remoting.exchange.support.header.HeaderExchangeServer.reset(Parameters)
    org.apache.dubbo.remoting.exchange.support.header.HeaderExchangeClient.reset(Parameters)
    org.apache.dubbo.remoting.transport.ServerDelegate.reset(Parameters)
    org.apache.dubbo.remoting.transport.ClientDelegate.reset(Parameters)
    org.apache.dubbo.remoting.transport.AbstractEndpoint.reset(Parameters)
    org.apache.dubbo.common.extension.ExtensionLoader.resetExtensionLoader(Class)
    org.apache.dubbo.config.spring.util.DubboAnnotationUtils.resolveInterfaceName(Reference, Class<?>)
    org.apache.dubbo.config.spring.util.DubboAnnotationUtils.resolveInterfaceName(Service, Class<?>)
    org.apache.dubbo.config.AbstractInterfaceConfig.setApplication(ApplicationConfig)
    org.apache.dubbo.rpc.model.ApplicationModel.setApplication(String)
    org.apache.dubbo.rpc.RpcInvocation.setAttachments(Map<String, String>)
    org.apache.dubbo.rpc.FutureContext.setCompatibleFuture(CompletableFuture<?>)
    org.apache.dubbo.config.AbstractInterfaceConfig.setConfigCenter(ConfigCenterConfig)
    org.apache.dubbo.config.ProviderConfig.setDispather(String)
    ProviderConfig.setDispatcher(String)
    org.apache.dubbo.config.ProtocolConfig.setDispather(String)
    ProtocolConfig.setDispatcher(String)
    org.apache.dubbo.config.AbstractReferenceConfig.setGeneric(Boolean)
    org.apache.dubbo.remoting.exchange.Response.setHeartbeat(boolean)
    org.apache.dubbo.config.AbstractReferenceConfig.setInjvm(Boolean)
    instead, use the parameter scope to judge if it's in jvm, scope=local
    org.apache.dubbo.config.ServiceConfigBase.setInterfaceClass(Class<?>) 
    org.apache.dubbo.config.ReferenceConfigBase.setInterfaceClass(Class<?>) 
    org.apache.dubbo.config.AbstractInterfaceConfig.setLocal(Boolean)
    Replace to setStub(Boolean)
    org.apache.dubbo.config.AbstractInterfaceConfig.setLocal(String)
    Replace to setStub(String)
    org.apache.dubbo.config.AbstractInterfaceConfig.setMetadataReportConfig(MetadataReportConfig)
    org.apache.dubbo.config.AbstractInterfaceConfig.setMetrics(MetricsConfig)
    org.apache.dubbo.config.AbstractInterfaceConfig.setModule(ModuleConfig)
    org.apache.dubbo.config.AbstractInterfaceConfig.setMonitor(MonitorConfig)
    org.apache.dubbo.config.AbstractInterfaceConfig.setMonitor(String)
    org.apache.dubbo.config.ProviderConfig.setPath(String)
    org.apache.dubbo.config.ProtocolConfig.setPath(String)
    org.apache.dubbo.config.ProviderConfig.setPort(Integer)
    org.apache.dubbo.config.ProviderConfig.setProtocol(String)
    org.apache.dubbo.config.ServiceConfigBase.setProviders(List<ProviderConfig>)
    Replace to setProtocols()
    org.apache.dubbo.config.MethodConfig.setReliable(Boolean)
    org.apache.dubbo.config.MethodConfig.setRetry(Boolean)
    org.apache.dubbo.config.MethodConfig.setStat(Integer)
    org.apache.dubbo.config.RegistryConfig.setTransport(String) 
    org.apache.dubbo.config.RegistryConfig.setWait(Integer) 
    org.apache.dubbo.config.bootstrap.builders.RegistryBuilder.transport(String) 
    org.apache.dubbo.rpc.model.ApplicationModel.tryGetApplication()
    org.apache.dubbo.config.bootstrap.builders.RegistryBuilder.wait(Integer)

    org.apache.dubbo.config.annotation.DubboService.local 
    org.apache.dubbo.config.annotation.DubboReference.services
    using DubboReference.providedBy()
